extension.summary: Transfer personal Stream Cinema and TitDeepL settings between Kodi installations
Prenos osobnych nastaveni Stream Cinema a TitDeepL medzi Kodi instalaciami
Prenos osobnich nastaveni Stream Cinema a TitDeepL mezi instalacemi Kodi
extension.description: Unlocks an encrypted personal settings bundle with your login and applies it to Stream Cinema and TitDeepL LocalSub.
Odomkne sifrovany osobny balik nastaveni prihlasenim a zapise ho do Stream Cinema a TitDeepL LocalSub.
Odemkne sifrovany osobni balik nastaveni prihlasenim a zapise ho do Stream Cinema a TitDeepL LocalSub.
